landing.hero: Find out where you actually stand as a Muslim man.
landing.subhero: A 5-minute diagnostic across identity, self-discipline, marriage, and brotherhood. No fluff. Just an honest mirror.

register.title: Before we begin
register.body: Enter your details so we can send your full result to your inbox.

intro.title: This is not a personality test.
intro.body: Before you begin: answer based on the habits and patterns you have right now — not who you want to be, not who you used to be. The test only works if you are honest with yourself.

thankYou.title: You showed up. That matters.
thankYou.body: Most men never stop long enough to ask these questions. You did. The next step is a short call — no pitch, no pressure. We look at your result together and talk about what is actually holding you back.
thankYou.cta: See What the Max Program Covers
callBullets: We review your type and stage together — what they mean for your life right now
You get honest feedback on the one or two things most holding you back
We talk about whether the Max Program is a fit — and if it is not, we tell you that too
The call is 30 minutes. It costs nothing.

disclaimer.short: This assessment is a personal reflection tool, not a clinical diagnosis. It is not a substitute for professional mental health, marital, or religious counseling.
disclaimer.long: The Masterman Assessment is an educational and self-reflection tool grounded in Islamic values and principles of character development. It is not a clinical assessment, psychological diagnosis, or substitute for professional mental health, marital, or religious counseling. Results reflect patterns in your answers and are meant to prompt honest reflection — not to label or define you permanently. Your type and stage can and do change as you grow. Like any self-report tool, the accuracy of the result depends on how honestly you answer. If you are facing a mental health crisis or serious family situation, please seek qualified professional support.

share.whatsappMessage: I just took the Masterman Assessment. My type is {TYPE_CODE} — {TYPE_NAME}. Five minutes, honest answers. Take yours: {RESULT_URL}

accuracyQuestion.prompt: How accurately does this describe you right now?
accuracyQuestion.thanksMessage: Jazak Allah khayr — your feedback helps us improve the test.
